items.title: The White House is asking OpenAI to slow roll the release of its new model over safety concerns
items.summary: OpenAI reportedly plans to share its newest model, GPT 5.6, with a select group of partners instead of with the broader public. The reason: the Trump administration told it to.

items.title: YouTube Shorts are getting even shorter with an update that lets you double the playback speed
items.summary: YouTube Shorts is getting a makeover.

items.title: Patronus AI lands $50M to build ‘digital worlds’ that stress-test AI agents
items.summary: Agent-testing startup Patronus AI, founded by former Meta AI researchers, is experiencing nearly insatiable demand, its investor says.

items.title: Polymarket says hackers stole users’ funds
items.summary: The prediction market giant Polymarket said it's refunding users who had funds stolen due to a third-party breach.

items.title: Xbox follows Apple with price increases
items.summary: The company says the increases are being driven by rising memory and console storage prices, with costs more than 2.5x higher than previous levels.

items.title: Notion Mail shuts down amid agent takeover
items.summary: The company said it is discontinuing its email inbox in favor of its AI agent offering as users are increasingly handing over the reins of their email to the agents.

items.title: a16z-backed Base Power is offering cheaper electricity to the power grid that needs it most
items.summary: Base Power is skipping the PJM's troubled interconnection queue by placing its batteries at people's homes, offering backup services in exchange.

items.title: Anthropic’s Claude is winning over paid consumers, a market owned by ChatGPT
items.summary: Despite ChatGPT's commanding market lead, consumers who pay for AI have been increasingly choosing Anthropic's Claude, data shows.

items.title: General Intuition’s $2.3B bet that video games can train AI agents for the real world
items.summary: General Intuition has raised $320 million to scale AI trained on millions of hours of gameplay, betting action data can help AI develop something closer to human intuition.

items.title: Databricks’ former AI chief thinks he can cut AI’s power bill by 1,000x
items.summary: Un-0 is an image-generation system tool that shows for the first time how the company's technology can replicate conventional AI systems.

items.title: Hacked Klue says criminals are deleting stolen customer data, but now other hackers are making threats
items.summary: Market research company Klue told customers that it believes the hacking group that stole their data is now deleting it. The company, however, warned about a second group of hackers wanting ransom.

items.title: Rippling now wants to be your entire data stack
items.summary: "There were employees doing things like, 'Claude is so helpful for me — it analyzes my calendar and my email and puts together a plan for me,'" he says. "That person was spending at a run rate of $30,000 a year for this."

items.title: Google Finance gets a dedicated app for Android
items.summary: Users will be able to access their watchlists, real-time market data, live financial news, and Google's AI-powered "Key Moments" feature, which explains why stocks moved.

items.title: Netris raises $15M Series A from a16z to help AI neoclouds go live faster
items.summary: Netris provides software that runs on network switches, and offers a platform that helps neocloud operators reduce the time it takes to go live.

items.title: Trump administration bars Polestar from selling its new EVs in the US
items.summary: The Department of Commerce declined to give the Chinese-owned automaker a special authorization to keep selling EVs in the U.S.

items.title: Apple raises Mac and iPad prices, spares iPhone for now
items.summary: Apple raises prices of MacBook Air and Pro along with iPad Air and Pro.

items.title: 2 days left to save up to $190: Join 1,000+ founders and investors at TechCrunch Founder Summit
items.summary: Two days left to lock in your spot at TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 and save up to $190 before Early Bird rates expire on June 26 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register today.

items.title: Trump administration proposes axing brake-pedal requirement for AVs in a boost for Tesla
items.summary: The Department of Transportation wants to remove the brake-pedal requirement for vehicles "designed to be driven exclusively by automated driving systems."

items.title: Adobe acquires image and video enhancement tool maker Topaz Labs
items.summary: Adobe said that it will integrate Topaz Labs' tools across its apps.

items.title: Amazon ups India bet with fresh $13B AI infrastructure investment
items.summary: Amazon’s latest India investment comes as global tech companies race to expand AI infrastructure in the country.
